def negative_python_perf_layer_string_handling_regex_compiled_per_call():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_string_handling_regex_compiled_per_call"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: String handling. Flag re.compile calls in repeated functions, handlers, or loops instead of module-level compiled patterns."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
